steps.title: Modify the word term
steps.content: The blank follows a term and introduces what that term means. It needs a participial modifier that links term to the following that-clause, not a finite verb starting a separate clause.

steps.title: Avoid finite verbs
steps.content: Choices A, B, and C use finite verb forms, leaving the sentence with an ungrammatical extra verb after term. The remaining choice uses a present participle to modify term smoothly. The answer is D.
